calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order, Turnover Order
Off Calendar Apr-27-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Pacific Bell's motion for assignment of rights, restraining and turnover order is granted. No opposition has been filed. Prevailing party to submit form of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO INTERROGATORIES
Off Calendar Nov-02-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff's motion to compel answers to post judgment interrogatories is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objection within 15 days of notice of this order. Failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $311.30 are to be paid within 15 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
